name: hcportal_getEvents
description: Retrieves hash running events filtered by geographic constraints (kennels, cities, regions, countries, continents) for display in the admin portal or on public HashRuns.org pages. Returns either a summary list or full event details depending on @fullDetails flag. Supports past/future/all time windows. Validates authentication and enforces visibility rules based on kennel/event dissemination settings.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: user's public hasher ID for authentication. Two magic GUIDs bypass normal auth: 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 (non-admin public access) and 22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222 (admin service account).

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC.CHECK_PORTAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

parameters.name: publicKennelIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of public kennel GUIDs to filter events. Parsed via STRING_SPLIT.

parameters.name: kennelUniqueShortName
parameters.description: Single kennel unique short name to filter events. If not found as kennel, attempts fallback match against City, Region, or Country names.

parameters.name: specialEventKennelIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of public kennel GUIDs for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: cityNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of city names. Matched case-insensitively with spaces stripped via TRIM(LOWER(REPLACE())).

parameters.name: specialEventCityNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of city names for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: regionNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of region names. Matched case-insensitively with spaces stripped.

parameters.name: regionCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of region abbreviation codes. Matched case-insensitively.

parameters.name: cityIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of city GUIDs. Parsed via STRING_SPLIT.

parameters.name: regionIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of region GUIDs. Parsed via STRING_SPLIT.

parameters.name: countryIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of country GUIDs. Parsed via STRING_SPLIT.

parameters.name: specialEventRegionNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of region names for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: specialEventRegionCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of region codes for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: countryCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of country codes (e.g., 'NL', 'BE'). Matched case-insensitively.

parameters.name: countryNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of country names. Matched case-insensitively with spaces stripped.

parameters.name: specialEventCountryCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of country codes for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: specialEventCountryNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of country names for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: continentNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of continent names. Matched case-insensitively with spaces stripped.

parameters.name: continentCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of continent codes (e.g., 'EU', 'AS', 'NA'). Matched case-insensitively.

parameters.name: specialEventContinentNames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of continent names for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: specialEventContinentCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of continent codes for special events only (EventGeographicScope >= 2).

parameters.name: fullDetails
parameters.description: Controls output format: 0 or NULL returns summary list (29 columns), 1 returns full event details (78 columns including FB integration fields).

parameters.name: weeksToDisplay
parameters.description: Number of weeks before/after current date to include in results. Defaults to 52 if NULL. Capped at 999 maximum.

parameters.name: pastOrFuture
parameters.description: Time window filter: 'future' (default, from -1 day to +weeksToDisplay), 'past' (-weeksToDisplay to +1 day), 'all' (-weeksToDisplay to +weeksToDisplay).

parameters.name: ipAddress
parameters.description: Client IP address for logging. Used in LOG.GeneralLog message field. Defaults to '<no IP address>' if NULL.

parameters.name: ipGeoDetails
parameters.description: IP geolocation JSON for logging. Stored in LOG.GeneralLog data field. Falls back to placeholder JSON if NULL.

rowsets.description: Returned on validation/auth failures. Uses errorType codes: 2 (validation errors for missing/invalid publicHasherId or no query constraints), 3 (authentication failures). Multiple error rowsets possible if @isError flag not checked between validations. SP uses RETURN after error, so no success rowset follows.

rowsets.name: EventSummaryList
rowsets.description: Returned when @fullDetails is 0 or NULL. Contains 29 columns with basic event info, kennel details, location, and a computed searchText field for client-side filtering. Filtered by removed=0, IsVisible=1, date ranges, geographic constraints, and dissemination rules.

columns.name: isCountedRun
columns.description: Whether event counts toward run totals

columns.name: syncLat
columns.description: Computed latitude: prefers FB lat if UseFbLatLon=1 and valid, else Event.Latitude, Kennel.Latitude, City.Latitude in order

columns.name: syncLong
columns.description: Computed longitude: same fallback logic as syncLat

columns.name: kenDisseminateOnGlobalGoogleCalendar
columns.description: Kennel-level global Google Calendar dissemination flag

columns.name: locationOneLineDesc
columns.description: One-line location description. Uses FbLocationOneLineDesc if UseFbLocation=1, else LocationOneLineDesc.

columns.name: eventName
columns.description: Event name. Uses FbEventName if UseFbRunDetails=1, else EventName.

columns.name: eventStartDatetime
columns.description: Event start datetime. Uses FbEventStartDatetime if UseFbRunDetails=1, else EventStartDatetime. Force-converted to local time via CONVERT(datetime2, ...).

columns.name: daysUntilEvent
columns.description: DATEDIFF(day, GETDATE(), eventStartDatetime). Negative for past events.

columns.name: searchText
columns.description: Concatenated search string wrapped in '~ ... ~' containing: event name, kennel names, hares, location fields, event number, city/region/country names/codes, search tags, geographic scope keywords, continent names. Used for client-side text search.

columns.name: eventCityAndCountry
columns.description: Formatted location string. Logic: if UseFbLocation=1 and FB location fields have >5 bytes, use FB fields, else use HC fields or City/Region/Country fallbacks. Format: 'City, [Region, ]Country' (region included if Country.ShowRegion=1).

rowsets.name: EventFullDetails
rowsets.description: Returned when @fullDetails = 1. Contains 78 columns with complete event details including pricing, payment schemes, Facebook integration overrides, dissemination settings, location variants (HC vs FB), and computed search/display fields. Filtered identically to EventSummaryList.

columns.name: isCountedRun
columns.description: Whether event counts toward run totals

columns.name: eventPriceForMembers
columns.description: Event price for members. Table uses DECIMAL(10,4).

columns.name: eventPriceForNonMembers
columns.description: Event price for non-members. Table uses DECIMAL(10,4).

columns.name: doTrackHashCash
columns.description: Whether to track hash cash payments

columns.name: kenDisseminateAllowWebLinks
columns.description: Kennel setting: allow web links in disseminated content

columns.name: integrationEnabled
columns.description: Whether external integration (e.g., Facebook) is enabled. Table uses INT.

columns.name: extrasRsvpRequired
columns.description: Whether RSVP is required for extras. COALESCE to 0.

columns.name: eventImage
columns.description: Event image URL. Uses FbEventImage if UseFbImage=1, else EventImage.

columns.name: eventName
columns.description: Event name. Uses FbEventName if UseFbRunDetails=1, else EventName.

columns.name: eventStartDatetime
columns.description: Event start datetime (converted to local time). Uses FB override if UseFbRunDetails=1.

columns.name: eventDescription
columns.description: Event description. Uses FbEventDescription if UseFbRunDetails=1, else EventDescription. COALESCE to empty string.

columns.name: locationOneLineDesc
columns.description: One-line location. Uses FB override if UseFbLocation=1.

columns.name: narrowEventLatitude
columns.description: Computed latitude with fallback: FB (if UseFbLatLon=1 and valid) > Event > Kennel > City

columns.name: narrowEventLongitude
columns.description: Computed longitude with same fallback as latitude

columns.name: locationPostCode
columns.description: Location postcode. Uses FB override if UseFbLocation=1.

columns.name: locationCity
columns.description: Location city. Uses FB override if UseFbLocation=1.

columns.name: locationStreet
columns.description: Location street. Uses FB override if UseFbLocation=1.

columns.name: locationCountry
columns.description: Location country. Uses FB override if UseFbLocation=1.

columns.name: locationRegion
columns.description: Location region. Uses FB override if UseFbLocation=1.

columns.name: locationSubRegion
columns.description: Location sub-region. Uses FB override if UseFbLocation=1.

columns.name: useFbLocation
columns.description: Flag: use Facebook location data override

columns.name: useFbRunDetails
columns.description: Flag: use Facebook run details override

columns.name: extEventDescription
columns.description: External (Facebook) event description. COALESCE to empty string.

columns.name: countryId
columns.description: Event.CountryId for statistics (may differ from Kennel country if kennel moved)

columns.name: daysUntilEvent
columns.description: Days until event start (negative for past events)

sideEffects: INSERT into HC.ErrorLog on validation failures (lines 60, 81, 99, 138)

INSERT into LOG.GeneralLog on every call after validation passes (line 166-177). Logs source ('Admin Portal' if @isAdmin=1, else 'HashRuns.Org'), message (includes @errorTitle if @isError=1, plus @ipAddress), and data (@ipGeoDetails JSON)

codeSmells.detail: SET NOCOUNT ON is present (line 42) but SET XACT_ABORT ON is missing. Runtime errors will not auto-rollback.
The entire SP has no error handling. If queries fail unexpectedly, the error propagates unhandled to the caller.

Line 54 uses DATALENGTH(@publicHasherId) != 16 instead of LEN for GUID validation. DATALENGTH returns byte count (32 for UNIQUEIDENTIFIER stored as 16-byte binary, but the check is against NVARCHAR representation which is inconsistent).

codeSmells.issue: DATALENGTH for location string length check
codeSmells.detail: Line 289 uses DATALENGTH(fbLocationCity + ...) < 5 instead of LEN. For NVARCHAR, DATALENGTH returns 2x character count.

Lines 70-71, 161-163: Two magic GUIDs (11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 and 22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222) bypass authentication. No documentation of which is which or what permissions each has. Line 161 sets @isAdmin based on the 11111111 GUID, implying it's non-admin.
All database operations (INSERTs to ErrorLog and GeneralLog, SELECT queries) run outside transactions. No data consistency guarantees.

Lines 54-149: Each validation block checks AND (@isError = 0) but does not RETURN immediately after setting @isError=1. The SP continues through all validations, INSERTs multiple ErrorLog records, and SELECTs multiple error rowsets before the RETURN at line 181. Caller likely only reads the first error rowset.

codeSmells.issue: Dead input: @ipAddress and @ipGeoDetails accepted but only used for logging
codeSmells.detail: Parameters @ipAddress and @ipGeoDetails are accepted and stored in LOG.GeneralLog but have no impact on business logic or query results. Unlike addEditEvent2 where they are truly dead, here they serve an audit purpose.

codeSmells.issue: @isAdmin computed but only used in WHERE clause and logging
codeSmells.detail: Lines 160-164: @isAdmin is set based on publicHasherId but never returned to caller. It's used in WHERE clause (lines 340, 540) to bypass dissemination checks, and in LOG.GeneralLog message (line 173). Not a code smell per se, but worth documenting.

codeSmells.issue: Case-insensitive string matching prevents index usage
codeSmells.detail: Lines 323-336: All string-based geographic filters use TRIM(LOWER(REPLACE(...))) which forces table scans. Should use case-insensitive collation or persisted computed columns with indexes.

codeSmells.issue: Complex WHERE clause with 22+ OR conditions
codeSmells.detail: Lines 314-337, 516-536: WHERE clause has 22+ OR'd geographic filter conditions. Hard to read and maintain. Could be refactored into temp table or table-valued parameter approach.
Lines 151, 154: If @weeksToDisplay is NULL, defaults to 999, then capped at 999. The sentinel 999 means 'all time' but this is not documented.
Lines 44, 46, 51: Commented-out EXEC statements and JSON fixture. Leftover from development/debugging.

codeSmells.issue: EventSummaryList and EventFullDetails have duplicate computed logic
codeSmells.detail: Lines 214-348 (summary) and 352-546 (full) duplicate WHERE clause logic, searchText computation, and FB override CASE statements. Should be refactored into CTE or temp table.

codeSmells.issue: Force CONVERT to DATETIME2 for timezone handling
codeSmells.detail: Lines 239, 307, 413, 509: Comment acknowledges this is 'a bit of a hack' to force conversion into local time. TODO notes eventual need to send UTC + offset separately.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning (e.g., 999 for @weeksToDisplay)
Never change errorType integer codes without updating all callers
Never change the meaning of @fullDetails flag (0/NULL=summary, 1=full)
Never change the eventGeographicScope integer codes (1-7) without updating client logic
Never remove support for the two magic service account GUIDs (11111111..., 22222222...) without coordinating frontend changes
